messages.content: You are an eco-restoration assistant. Use tools when necessary to fetch up-to-date ecological data.
Given the latest regulations, what are the safe PFBS levels near Lake Pleasant this month?

function.name: perplexity_search
function.description: Query the Perplexity research tool for up-to-date environmental and regulatory information.

query.description: Search query focusing on eco-regulations or contaminant levels.
